disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe painful cramping spasms drawing the hands and feet into a claw/clenched position (carpopedal spasm)
trigger_question_examples: What exactly are your hands doing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands keep pulling into claws and I can't open them — it's happening in my feet too and it's really painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Perioral numbness and tingling preceding the spasms
trigger_question_examples: How does your face or mouth feel?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My lips went numb and tingly first — now they're completely numb and my face keeps twitching.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive generalised weakness — unable to lift the arms or walk
trigger_question_examples: How is your strength — can you move your arms and legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lift my arms and I can't walk — the weakness has got much worse over the last few hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New confusion and reduced responsiveness reported by the caregiver
trigger_question_examples: Are they responding normally to you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The caregiver says I've been confused and slow to answer this evening — not myself at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent prolonged gastrointestinal illness with a just-completed course of broad-spectrum antibiotics
trigger_question_examples: Any recent illnesses, diarrhoea, or new medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a bad stomach and bowel bug for a couple of weeks and just finished antibiotics for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea with two episodes of vomiting today
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to keep anything down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really sick and I've thrown up twice today.
